label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: URÁN Rigoberto won from the breakaway after CRADDOCK Lawson's early solo attack faded on the final climb to Monasterio de Tentudía.
tactical_patterns: CRADDOCK Lawson attacked as time trialist at climb base with 26-second gap, avoiding superior climbers in finale.
EF Education hunted UCI points aggressively after ROGLIČ crash elevated URÁN into top-10, changing team objectives mid-race.
EVENEPOEL Remco and MAS Enric rode defensively together when GC group fractured, prioritizing podium defense over stage gaps.
ARENSMAN Thymen cracked badly after aggressive Stage 15 ride, revealing short recovery window limits repeated mountain attacks.

rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: Closed 26-second gap to CRADDOCK then outsprinted PACHER, showing diesel climbing matched with finishing speed.
rider_signals.CRADDOCK Lawson: neutral: Time trial power created meaningful solo gap early on climb but lacked accelerations to hold off pure climbers.
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: negative: Lost five minutes to favorites after being aggressive Stage 15 winner, indicating recovery cost high.
rider_signals.PACHER Quentin: positive: Second place after bridging late demonstrates strong positioning instincts in fragmented breakaway racing.
rider_signals.HERRADA Jesús: positive: Stage 7 winner animated breakaway again, confirming sustained form and willingness to work between stage wins.
